name: a realistic HTML source with 30 headings yields at least 30 rules (proves the pre-CL empirical result of 0 rules per URL is fixed)
command:
OUT=/tmp/cl564-r15-$$; mkdir -p $OUT/out && python3 -c 'print(""); [print(f"

Rule number {i}

prose for rule {i}. MUST be applied to typescript files.

") for i in range(1,35)]; print("")' > $OUT/s.html; cat > $OUT/reg.yaml </dev/null; N=$(grep -c '^- id: g-' $OUT/out/typescript/r15-src.yaml 2>/dev/null || echo 0); [ "$N" -ge 30 ] && echo yield-per-url-many-rules 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
